areas._note: count = directory INDEX entries (data/areas.json), built from data/source/villages.csv (192 villages). The per-area files (data/areas/*.json) AND the Supabase areas mirror are 196: the 4 extra are deactivated duplicate-Rightmove / merged variants intentionally kept out of the index — charlwood-so24, colemore-gu32, flexcombe-gu33, froxfield-green-gu32 (flexcombe-gu33 research merged into the canonical flexcombe-gu32). Guarded by tests/areas-index-sync.test.js. (Corrected 2026-06-03: the prior note's gu34 ids were stale.) 2026-06-03: 100 areas down-synced from Supabase (DB was source for this run); repo now 192 researched + 1 partial (lane-end-so21) + 3 directory (ebble-sp5, newtown-sp5, worthy-down-so21 — not yet researched in Supabase). 2026-06-03: added whiteley-po15 (researched). 2026-06-04: chillworth-so16 set active:false (soft-ignored — pruned from the fetcher's L7.5 active set; still in index/mirror); its 277 listings rejected. 2026-06-04: hambledon-po7 likewise set active:false; its 244 listings rejected (212 new wrong_area). 2026-06-04: soft-ignored 6 more areas (active:false) — newton-stacey-sp11, wherwell-sp11, bordon-gu35, sherrington-ba12, tisbury-sp3, southwick-po17. All 8 removed areas' listings (969 total) re-tagged reject/removed_area — a new administrative reason EXCLUDED from preference learning (see assets/js/listings/reactions.js SYSTEM_REJECT_REASONS + learned-preferences weights.js isTraining), so wholesale area ignores no longer skew learned type/outcode/price weights. 2026-06-04 (L7.6): set active:false on 4 more areas — dundridge-so32, kimbridge-so51, pucknall-so51, embley-so51; corrected the mis-placed waltham-chase-so32 pin (was 50.9675,-1.2077 ~2mi N of the village; now provisional listing-centroid 50.9363,-1.2023 pending the web-verification pass). Their 63 listings were RE-ATTRIBUTED to active neighbours via the new name-aware geofence tiebreak (tools/listings-normalise.mjs withinGeofence) — 0 orphaned, 0 deleted; the 6 liked Dundridge homes are now correctly on waltham-chase-so32. Supabase areas mirror updated via jsonb_set (5 rows). 2026-06-04 (Phase 2 coord alignment): DB is now the SOURCE OF TRUTH for areas (CLAUDE.md §18.5 relaxed); new tools/sync-areas-from-supabase.mjs materialises DB->repo, guarded by tests/areas-db-repo-parity.test.js + data/snapshots/areas.json. Applied 10 web-verified coord corrections (droxford, firsdown, great-wishford, middle-winterslow, south-newton, sutton-scotney, swanmore, west-grimstead, west-meon, west-winterslow); reconciled 6 id/postcode migrations carrying villages.csv + area_confirmations keys (lake->sp4, little-langford->sp3, steeple-langford->sp3, ugford->sp2 from the manifest; monkwood->so24 + totford->so24 newly surfaced by the parity check); normalised 3 directory areas' invalid 'needs_review' status->directory. verify-area-coords --online: 196 areas / 0 hard flags. 2026-06-04 (Romsey removal + monkwood, owner-directed): deactivated (active:false) the 5 town=Romsey villages (awbridge/dunbridge/lockerley/sherfield-english/shootash) to stop Romsey-direction wrong-area pulls — the Winchester-towned SO51 villages (michelmersh/timsbury/braishfield) are kept as the wanted coverage; active areas 183->178. Fixed monkwood-so24 town Petersfield->Winchester (matches the canonical DB + the SO24/Alresford geography).

listing_reactions._note: v3 L3: append-only reaction log (like/pass/reject + reason, listing_snapshot). 1136 rows as of 2026-06-04 (264 on 2026-06-03; 0 at table creation 2026-05-30). 2026-06-04: bulk reject batches via MCP — unwanted property types (Flat/Apartment/Penthouse→wrong_house_type/flat, plus Maisonette/Ground Flat/Ground Maisonette/Retirement/Coach House/Park Home/Land/Plot/Mobile Home/House Share/HMO/Garages/Farm Land/Equestrian/Not Specified→reject) and all chillworth-so16 listings→reject/wrong_area. 2026-06-04: PRICE-BAND batch — 265 active listings priced >£440k bulk-rejected reject/too_expensive (reasons sub-detail over_budget → price-band training signal), with snapshots so weights.js#isTraining keeps them; the 1 over-£440k liked listing preserved (§18.5). Active pool 945→680. Append-only — Supabase always wins; snapshot pulled live via MCP, never written back by Claude. Tracked sync table #18 (16 user-state + 2 content).

learned_preferences._note: v3 L4/L5: distilled preference weights, one row/household (derived = Layer 2 from the reaction log; overrides = Layer 3 manual/AI; dismissals = L5 conflict-prompt quiet-until map, added by migration learned_preferences_dismissals_l5). 1 row present, recomputed from the reaction log as of 2026-06-03 (0 at table creation 2026-05-31). Recomputed user-state — Supabase wins; snapshot pulled live via MCP. Tracked sync table #19 (17 user-state + 2 content).

area_confirmations._note: v3 Step5: per-household area location review confirmations blob ({ confirmed: { areaId: isoTimestamp } }), one row/household. 1 row present (count was previously 191 — a copy-paste error from the areas block, corrected 2026-06-03 against live via MCP). Tracked sync table #20 (18 user-state + 2 content). 2026-06-04 (Phase 2): value-preserving id-key remap (narrow §18.4 relaxation) carrying 6 area-id migrations — lake-sp3->lake-sp4, ugford-sp4->ugford-sp2, little-langford-sp4->little-langford-sp3, steeple-langford-sp4->steeple-langford-sp3, monkwood-gu34->monkwood-so24, totford-so20->totford-so24 — original confirmation timestamps preserved.

listings._note: v3 L1: fetcher-written live content (NOT git-versioned, NOT one of the 20 tracked git-synced tables). Backfilled 2026-05-31 with 1298 real listings via tools/import-apify-runs.mjs (storage read of already-paid Apify datasets, no new spend) across 12 outcodes; 0 unmatched, 0 out-of-region. Fetcher BASELINE_PRICE_MAX lowered 500k→450k so over-budget listings stop arriving. 2026-06-04 P5 junk purge (Supabase MCP, user-approved): DELETEd 1,671 baseline-violating rows that were NOT liked (excluded type / >£450k / <£100k / <2 beds); 3,086→1,415, feed-visible 2,539→1,252, 0 baseline-violators remain. The reject SIGNAL persists in the append-only listing_reactions log (unchanged at 3,244) so feed suppression survives the purge; all 20 liked rows preserved. Forward maintenance now via tools/purge-listings.mjs. 2026-06-04 P7 removed-area purge (Supabase MCP, user-approved): DELETEd 551 not-liked listings across the 9 inactive (active:false) areas tagged reject/removed_area — 1,415→864, feed-visible 1,252→737. KEPT the 3 once-liked homes in those areas (ever-liked is never purged: 174896075 chillworth-so16, 173703758 + 174230156 newton-stacey-sp11) and 1 active-area straggler (88535232 whiteley-po15, still wrongly tagged removed_area); listing_reactions untouched at 3,244; 551 delete rows logged to sync_log. 2026-06-04 (L7.6 re-attribution): the 63 listings in the 4 newly-inactive areas (dundridge/kimbridge/pucknall/embley) were re-homed to active neighbours (waltham-chase/swanmore/dunbridge/michelmersh) via the name-aware tiebreak + corrected Waltham Chase pin; all in-buffer, 0 orphaned, so 0 deleted (count stays 864); the 6 liked moved dundridge-so32 -> waltham-chase-so32. 2026-06-04 (Phase 2 re-attribution): pure geofence recompute (tools/backfill-geofence.mjs, £0) against the corrected pins — 226 rows changed (204 re-homed, incl. the 48 former wield-gu35 orphans now on the real wield-so24 pin; 20 newly out-of-buffer; 4 recovered). area_id NOT IN areas now 0. 143 listings geofence_pass=false (out of every village buffer — feed-excluded, NOT deleted; orphan report emitted by area_id: over-wallop-so20 59, wield-so24 45, steeple-langford-sp3 12, little-durnford-sp4 11, bishop-s-waltham-so32 5, woodminton-sp5 5, others ≤2). Romsey (user decision: no Romsey area created): the 50 Romsey-post-town SO51 listings all geofence in-buffer (~1mi) to WANTED neighbours — dunbridge-so51 19, michelmersh-so51 15, timsbury-so51 10, braishfield-so51 4, awbridge-so51 1, bramshaw-so43 1; 0 liked — so KEPT (deleting would drop legit wanted-village inventory). 0 deletions this step; count stays 864. 2026-06-04 (Romsey purge, owner-directed): DELETEd 20 not-liked listings in the 5 deactivated town=Romsey villages (864->844); the 1 ever-liked Dunbridge home preserved (area_id stays dunbridge-so51, shown via the liked view). The 29 Romsey-post-town listings on the KEPT Winchester-towned villages (michelmersh 15 / timsbury 10 / braishfield 4) retained as legitimate wanted-village inventory.
